title: Persistent Counter Closure
description: Implement a function 'make_counter(start)' that returns a closure. Each call to the closure should increment the counter and return the new value. It must support multiple independent counters.
test_script:
import unittest
from counter import make_counter
class TestCounter(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_closure(self):
        c1 = make_counter(10)
        c2 = make_counter(0)
        self.assertEqual(c1(), 11)
        self.assertEqual(c2(), 1)
